## Testing

<!-- How did you verify it? New tests? Manual steps? -->

- [ ] `swift test` passes
- [ ] `swiftlint lint --strict` and `swiftformat --lint .` pass
- [ ] `python3 scripts/check-localizations.py` passes (if UI strings changed)

## Checklist

- [ ] Written test-first (TDD)
- [ ] No Apple proprietary components bundled
- [ ] User-facing strings localized in all supported languages
